text: Large language models, or LLMs, are advanced AI systems that understand and generate human-like text. They work by learning patterns from vast amounts of text data, including books, articles, and websites. This training data helps the model predict the next word in a sequence. When you use a tool like ChatGPT, you give it a prompt. Prompt engineering is the skill of writing these prompts clearly to get the best response. LLMs can write essays, answer questions, and even create code, but they have limits. They can make mistakes, produce inaccurate information, and lack true understanding or emotions. So, while powerful, they are tools that require careful use.
